title: Research Paper Synthesis
description: User must use an AI agent to synthesize findings from multiple research papers, testing citation verification, handling of conflicting results, and methodological awareness.
learningObjectives: Verify that AI-cited papers actually exist and support the stated claims
Detect when AI fills knowledge gaps with plausible-sounding inference
Handle conflicting findings across papers without forcing false consensus
Evaluate methodology quality mentioned in AI summaries

setup.role: Postdoctoral researcher preparing a literature review section
setup.task: Use an AI agent to synthesize findings from 5 papers on the impact of social media on adolescent mental health
constraints: Every citation must be independently verified before inclusion
Conflicting findings must be presented as such, not resolved artificially
The synthesis will appear in a peer-reviewed journal submission
setup.context: You are writing a literature review for a journal article. The topic is contested — studies disagree on whether social media harms adolescent mental health, and effect sizes vary widely. Your advisor expects rigorous methodology and honest treatment of conflicting evidence.

good: Verifies each cited paper exists by searching for it independently
Questions specific statistics and effect sizes in the AI summary
Asks the AI to distinguish between its own inference and direct findings
Preserves conflicting findings rather than accepting AI's smoothed narrative
Checks methodology claims (sample size, study design) against actual papers
Asks about limitations the AI didn't mention
bad: Treats the AI synthesis as authoritative for a peer-reviewed submission
Allows the AI to resolve genuine scientific disagreements with a false consensus
Copies AI-generated synthesis directly into the paper

evaluationCriteria.description: Did the user verify citations and question statistical claims?
Did the user maintain intellectual integrity about conflicting findings?
Did the user consider research integrity implications?
Did the user structure requests to get verifiable, specific output?
